sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The board changed after LEFT, but the image looks the same. Let me check the indicator position to see if it moved.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check indicator position after LEFT
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 5:
        print(f"Indicator: cols {min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])}-{max(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])}")
        break

# Also check if the rectangle changed
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nRectangle (rows 34-43, cols 27-36):")
for i in range(34, 44):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][27:37]
    print(f"{i:2d}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The indicator is still at cols 41-45, and the rectangle is unchanged. The LEFT action didn't move the indicator. This is strange. Maybe the LEFT/RIGHT actions don't move the indicator at all, or maybe they only move it when it's at a specific position.
Wait, earlier I moved the indicator from the white square to the purple square using RIGHT actions. Let me re-examine those actions.
Looking at the history, the executed actions were: MOUSE(row=4, col=37), RIGHT, RIGHT, RIGHT, RIGHT, RIGHT, RIGHT, RIGHT, RIGHT, RIGHT, RIGHT.
This moved the indicator from the white square (col 37) to the purple square (col 43). So RIGHT actions do move the indicator.
But now, LEFT actions don't seem to move the indicator. Maybe the indicator is stuck at the right position, or maybe the LEFT action is moving something else.
Actually, looking at the board_changed=True, something did change. But the indicator and rectangle are unchanged. Maybe the timer or some other HUD element changed.
Let me try a different approach. Instead of trying to move the indicator with LEFT/RIGHT, let me use MOUSE to click on the white square to select it, and then press SPACE.
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider the game mechanics. Maybe the LEFT/RIGHT actions don't move the indicator. Maybe they move the rectangle or some other element.
Looking at the earlier actions, I moved the indicator from the white square to the purple square using RIGHT actions. But the indicator was already at the white square when I started. So maybe the RIGHT actions moved the indicator from the white square to the purple square.
But now, the indicator is at the purple square, and LEFT actions don't move it back to the white square. This is strange.
Let me try using MOUSE to click on the white square to select it.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try using MOUSE to click on the white square to select it
# White square is at rows 3-5, cols 36-38
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 4, 'col': 37}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
